sessionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp for when the session was created.

sessionSummaries.description: A list of summaries for each session in your Amazon Web Services account.

nextToken.description: If the total number of results is greater than the maxResults value provided in the request, use this token when making another request in the nextToken field to return the next batch of results.

sessionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp for when the session was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp for when the session was last modified.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier for the session associated with the invocation.

createdAt.description: The timestamp for when the invocation was created.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the session you ended.

sessionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the session you ended.

sessionStatus.description: The current status of the session you ended.

queries.description: A list of objects, each of which defines a generated query that can correspond to the natural language queries.

sql.description: An SQL query that corresponds to the natural language query.

nextToken.description: If the total number of results is greater than the maxItems value provided in the request, use this token when making another request in the nextToken field to return the next batch of results.

memoryContents.description: Contains details of the sessions stored in the memory

memoryId.description: The unique identifier of the memory where the session summary is stored.

sessionExpiryTime.description: The time when the memory duration for the session is set to end.

flowAliasIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of the flow alias used for the flow execution.

flowVersion.description: The version of the flow used for the flow execution.

executionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM service role that's used by the flow execution.

definition.description:
The flow definition used for the flow execution, including the nodes, connections, and configuration at the time when the execution started.

The definition returns as a string that follows the structure of a FlowDefinition object.

customerEncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the customer managed KMS key that's used to encrypt the flow snapshot.

executionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the flow execution.

status.description:
The current status of the flow execution.

Flow executions time out after 24 hours.

startedAt.description: The timestamp when the flow execution started.

endedAt.description: The timestamp when the flow execution ended. This field is only populated when the execution has completed, failed, timed out, or been aborted.

errors.description: A list of errors that occurred during the flow execution. Each error includes an error code, message, and the node where the error occurred, if applicable.

flowAliasIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of the flow alias used for the execution.

flowVersion.description: The version of the flow used for the execution.

nodeName.description: The name of the node in the flow where the error occurred (if applicable).

error.description: The error code for the type of error that occurred.

message.description: A descriptive message that provides details about the error.

invocationStep.description: The complete details of the requested invocation step.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the session containing the invocation step.

invocationId.description: The unique identifier (in UUID format) for the invocation that includes the invocation step.

invocationStepId.description: The unique identifier (in UUID format) for the invocation step.

invocationStepTime.description: The timestamp for when the invocation step was created.

payload.description: Payload content, such as text and images, for the invocation step.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier for the session in UUID format.

sessionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp for when the session was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp for when the session was last modified.

sessionMetadata.description: A map of key-value pairs containing attributes persisted across the session.

encryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Key Management Service key used to encrypt the session data. For more information, see Amazon Bedrock session encryption.

completion.description: The agent's response to the user prompt.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the input data in the request. The default value is application/json.

memoryId.description: The unique identifier of the agent memory.

chunk.description: Contains a part of an agent response and citations for it.

bytes.description: A part of the agent response in bytes.

attribution.description: Contains citations for a part of an agent response.

citations.description: A list of citations and related information for a part of an agent response.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the session with the agent.

trace.description: Contains one part of the agent's reasoning process and results from calling API actions and querying knowledge bases. You can use the trace to understand how the agent arrived at the response it provided the customer. For more information, see Trace enablement.

action.description: The trace action details used with the Guardrail.

preProcessingTrace.description: Details about the pre-processing step, in which the agent contextualizes and categorizes user inputs.

modelInvocationInput.description:
The input for the pre-processing step.

  • The type is PRE_PROCESSING.

  • The text contains the prompt.

  • The inferenceConfiguration, parserMode, and overrideLambda values are set in the PromptOverrideConfiguration object that was set when the agent was created or updated.

modelInvocationOutput.description: The foundation model output from the pre-processing step.

orchestrationTrace.description: Details about the orchestration step, in which the agent determines the order in which actions are executed and which knowledge bases are retrieved.

rationale.description: Details about the reasoning, based on the input, that the agent uses to justify carrying out an action group or getting information from a knowledge base.

invocationInput.description: Contains information pertaining to the action group or knowledge base that is being invoked.

observation.description: Details about the observation (the output of the action group Lambda or knowledge base) made by the agent.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the session you updated.

sessionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the session that was updated.

sessionStatus.description: The status of the session you updated.

createdAt.description: The timestamp for when the session was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp for when the session was last modified.
